# Ninja
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Ninja&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The ninja relies on speed and skill, using katanas and ninja stars to deal big damage.
| weaponSlot = Katana
| weapon = Rusty Katana
| abilitySlot = Star
| ability = Basic Staff
| armor = LeatherArmor
| armorLink = Leather Armors

| hpStart = 175
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 770

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 2 - 8
| mpCap = 252

| attStart = 15
| attLevel = 1 - 2
| attCap = 70

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 25

| spdStart = 10
| spdLevel = 0 - 2
| spdCap = 60

| dexStart = 12
| dexLevel = 1 - 2
| dexCap = 70

| vitStart = 12
| vitLevel = 0 - 1
| vitCap = 45

| wisStart = 12
| wisLevel = 1 - 2
| wisCap = 70
}}
